name: maX it PAWN
description_short: maX it PAWN is a Minneapolis pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, and discounted pre-owned retail merchandise with flexible payment options.
description_long:
maX it PAWN operates as part of the EZPAWN family of stores and is located at 815 Cedar Avenue in Minneapolis, Minnesota. The store functions as a traditional pawn shop serving the local community with quick cash solutions backed by tangible collateral. The business model centers on providing accessible short-term financing to consumers who may lack traditional credit access.

The store offers pawn loans on items in decent working condition, with loan amounts determined by item value. They also operate a gold and diamond buying service, testing precious metals to ensure fair pricing. Their retail side stocks thousands of pre-owned brand-name items—including electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment, musical instruments, handbags, and sneakers—marked down 25-70% below new retail prices. Additional financing options include layaway with 10% down and flexible third-party payment plans extending up to 12 months.

maX it PAWN distinguishes itself through its online presence, offering an Instant Quote tool for electronics, an online shop with daily new arrivals, and the EZ+ Rewards Program that awards points on eligible transactions and enables online payment management. They also offer specialty services including firearms sales, auto loans, product protection plans, and a Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits.

As a pawn operation, maX it PAWN serves consumers needing immediate cash access but willing to pledge collateral, though pawn loans carry fees and terms subject to individual agreements. The business is transparent about its pre-owned inventory status and includes protective disclaimers regarding brand affiliations. Store hours are Monday-Saturday 10am-6pm, with Sunday closures, and not all services are available in all areas.
address: 815 Cedar Ave Suite A-1, Minneapolis, MN 55404

company_info.headquarters: 815 Cedar Ave Suite A-1, Minneapolis, MN 55404

pros: Instant Quote tool provides online electronics valuation before visiting in person
EZ+ Rewards Program offers points on pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions
Jewelry VIP Program includes guaranteed loan amounts and 100% trade-up values on future purchases
Extensive brand-name inventory with 25-70% discounts updated daily
Multiple financing options including layaway (10% down), third-party payment plans (up to 12 months), and standard pawn loans
Gold and diamond expertise with precious metal testing for fair pricing
Online shop and payment management capability through EZ+ platform
cons: Pawn loans subject to undisclosed fees and terms requiring in-person discussion with staff
Limited availability of services varies by location (online payments not offered in Arizona, Oregon, Pennsylvania)
Short store hours (10am-6pm) with Sunday closures may not accommodate all schedules
All inventory is pre-owned with no warranty implied despite product protection plans available for extra cost
Collateral-based lending means loss of personal items if loan cannot be repaid
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable items they can temporarily pledge
Bargain hunters seeking 25-70% discounts on brand-name electronics, jewelry, and tools
People with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans
Individuals looking to sell gold, diamonds, or jewelry for quick cash without auction delays
diagnosis: maX it PAWN is best for consumers with valuable collateral who need immediate cash and either lack traditional credit access or prefer not to use it. The key caveat is that pawn loans are secured by personal property—failure to repay results in permanent loss of the pledged item, and exact fees and terms must be confirmed in-store before committing.
services: Pawn loans on items in decent working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with precious metal testing
Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise (electronics, tools, gaming, musical instruments)
Layaway with 10% down payment and monthly installments
Third-party flexible payment plans (up to 12 months, subject to credit eligibility)
Instant Quote online valuation tool for electronics
Online shop with daily new arrivals and inventory browsing
EZ+ Rewards Program with points earning and online payment management
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and free cleaning/stone replacement
